name: Microsoft E3 + Defender for Endpoint P2 + Purview add-ons
description: Microsoft 365 E3 with selective add-ons (Defender for Endpoint P2, Purview Information Protection & Governance). Most of the E5 detection power, without Sentinel.
compensating_controls: Without Sentinel, alert correlation must happen in Defender XDR (advanced hunting queries are similar in syntax).
Manual snapshot reports to Defender for Cloud Apps (DET-MS-MCAS-MANUAL-001) replace continuous discovery for orgs without that license.

things_to_know.title: Defender XDR hunting replaces Sentinel KQL
things_to_know.content: Most rules in this library work as Defender XDR Advanced Hunting queries with minor table-name adjustments. Defender XDR retains 30 days vs. Sentinel's longer retention.

things_to_know.title: Watchlist alternatives
things_to_know.content: Without Sentinel watchlists, maintain consumer LLM domain lists as KQL `dynamic([...])` literals in the rule, or push via Conditional Access Named Locations / MCAS app tags.

policy_token_replacements.siem_tool: Microsoft Defender XDR Advanced Hunting (with your central log archive)
